sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root צָעַר)-

(1) prop. smallness, hence something small, little, Gen 19:20 Job 8:7. Used of a small number, 2Ch 24:24, מִצְעַר אֲנָשִׁים “a few men;” of a short time, Isa 63:18, לַמִּצְעְר “for a little while.”

(2) [Mizar], pr.n. of a mountain on the eastern ridge of Lebanon, Psa 42:7.
